message:
✨ Enhance audit_kubeconfig with consolidation suggestions (#7)

- Detect multiple contexts pointing to the same server
- Suggest consolidating duplicate contexts
- Clearer cleanup recommendations for inaccessible contexts
- Separate sections for consolidation vs deletion

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
